title: Dacun Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Dacun, with a Z-Score of +3.80. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Dacun are extreme, with a heat wave that is significantly above the average temperature for this time of year.
The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 12.3 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling systems. The humidity level is at 63%, which can exacerbate the feeling of heat.
The wind speed is moderate at 16.5 km/h, providing some relief from the heat, but not enough to mitigate the critical conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency response plans to mitigate the effects of the heat wave in Dacun.
